overview.title: Task Management REST API
overview.purpose: This project provides a REST API for task management, designed for users who require CRUD operations on tasks using HTTP requests.
key_capabilities: Create, read, update, and delete tasks
Input validation for integrity and security

components.name: API Server
components.description: Handles incoming HTTP requests and processes them to manage task data stored in an SQLite database.
components.interface_summary: Clients interact with it via RESTful JSON endpoints over HTTP.

api_reference.description: Creates a new task with the provided details.
errors: Returns 400 if 'title' is missing or not a string

api_reference.description: Updates an existing task identified by its ID.
errors: Returns 400 if 'title' is missing or not a string
Returns 404 if the task ID does not exist

steps: Clone the repository to your local machine.
Set up your environment variables as needed.
Run 'npm start' to launch the API server.

operations.health_check: Send a GET request to the root endpoint '/' to check if the server responds.
operations.logging: Logs are written to the console with details on requests, responses, and errors.

common_issues.cause: Potential missing dependencies or incorrect environment variables.
common_issues.fix: Ensure Node.js and SQLite are installed and revisit configuration settings.

common_issues.cause: Task ID specified may not exist.
common_issues.fix: Verify that the task ID used is correct and present in the database.

known_limitations: Real-time synchronization of tasks is out of scope
documentation.summary: This documentation provides an overview of a task management REST API project, including its components, API endpoints, and operations guide for operators and maintainers, ensuring they can deploy and troubleshoot effectively.
